narrative:
35 Ohio House district has 91,063 registered voters, with 55.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.7 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +0.9% D−R vs -5.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
